supabase.description: NS Scrap ERP DEV/TARGET project in a separate Supabase account/context from the customer's legacy production project. Use for development, schema migration testing, Supabase Auth, RLS, and frontend integration. Project ref: fhglqymcdmrgbsbadnwr.

supabase-prod-source.description: NS Scrap ERP LEGACY-PROD/SOURCE project from the customer's old Supabase account/context. Use only for read-only audit and migration-source inspection. Do not apply schema changes here unless explicitly approved. Project ref: mqsgptraslgpyzbpndlg.

obsidian.description: Project-level Obsidian MCP for NS Scrap ERP. Vault path is scoped to this repository only.

playwright.description: Project-level Playwright MCP for browser QA, page inspection, accessibility snapshots, screenshots, and click-path verification of the active Next.js app.

clickup.description: Project-level ClickUp MCP for tasks, milestones, project planning, and delivery tracking.
